acceptance_conditions.label: the R166 protocol, contract, executor, and every R165 source artifact are hash-bound
three committed R165 profile manifests and 256 replay rows are independently loaded
row and manifest payload hashes are independently recomputed
all four policy selections are recomputed from retained binary64 leaves
source-return and policy-change aggregates match R165
the verifier does not import the R165 executor or call Qiskit
rehashed false stored selections are rejected by recomputation
removing the source-selected candidate is detected as a source-return mismatch
no production mapping, bug, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, or credit claim is emitted

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: independent recomputation of committed R165 candidate-level selections and rejection of altered evidence
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a production mapping change, alternate search path, confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-platform determinism, hardware relevance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
